# Zip Tool

## Overview

gSage AI ‚Äî zip_tool MCP tool.

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `zip_tool` | Compress, inspect, or extract ZIP archives attached to the current conversation | `files:read`, `files:write` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

## Operations

### `zip_tool`

- **`zip`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `file_ids` | `array` | ‚Äî | [action=zip] List of file UUIDs to compress. Obtain IDs from 'read_file' (list mode) or from previous tool results. |
  | `file_id` | `string` | ‚Äî | [action=list, action=unzip] UUID of the ZIP file to inspect or extract. |
  | `output_filename` | `string` | ‚Äî | [action=zip] Base name for the resulting ZIP (without extension). Defaults to 'files'. |
  | `entries` | `array` | ‚Äî | [action=unzip] Names of specific entries inside the ZIP to extract. If omitted, all non-directory entries are extracted. |
  | `output_prefix` | `string` | ‚Äî | [action=unzip] Optional prefix prepended to every extracted filename (e.g. 'invoice_' ‚Üí 'invoice_report.pdf'). |

- **`list`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `file_ids` | `array` | ‚Äî | [action=zip] List of file UUIDs to compress. Obtain IDs from 'read_file' (list mode) or from previous tool results. |
  | `file_id` | `string` | ‚Äî | [action=list, action=unzip] UUID of the ZIP file to inspect or extract. |

- **`unzip`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `file_id` | `string` | ‚Äî | [action=list, action=unzip] UUID of the ZIP file to inspect or extract. |
  | `entries` | `array` | ‚Äî | [action=unzip] Names of specific entries inside the ZIP to extract. If omitted, all non-directory entries are extracted. |
  | `output_prefix` | `string` | ‚Äî | [action=unzip] Optional prefix prepended to every extracted filename (e.g. 'invoice_' ‚Üí 'invoice_report.pdf'). |
